# libredash agent

Use the LibreDash read-only agent

## Usage

```sh
libredash agent
```

## Options

| Flag | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `--workspace` | string | `` | workspace id |

## Subcommands

- `libredash ask`: Ask the LibreDash read-only agent a question
- `libredash conversations`: List agent conversations
- `libredash tools`: List generated agent tools
